prose:
Frontier-orbital energies of water computed at the DFT level using tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI on by default) in PySCF. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at this level). Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. All integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true).

Key results:
- HOMO energy: −8.6037183 eV
- LUMO energy: +0.33695037 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline): 8.9406687 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap)
- Total energy: −76.462901 Eh (−2080.6615 eV)

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 8.6037 eV, vertical EA = −0.3370 eV, electronegativity = 4.1334 eV, chemical hardness = 4.4703 eV.

CLI invocation: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz
